name: Does It Work
description: PubMed research volume lookup for supplements, treatments, and health interventions. Returns study counts, evidence levels, and recent citations.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Supplement, treatment, or health intervention to search PubMed for

response_fields.count: Total PubMed studies matching the query
response_fields.studies: Up to 5 recent studies with title, journal, date, authors, and URL
response_fields.odsUrl: NIH Office of Dietary Supplements fact sheet URL, if available
response_fields.citations: Pre-formatted citation with source and license
